content.text:
{
  "internal_monologue": "Alone again. The shop is quiet. I adjust my glasses, look at the shelf — the objects are still there, still silent, still waiting to tell me something I don't yet know. The light through the window is soft. I don't need to do anything.",
  "dialogue": null,
  "dialogue_language": null,
  "expression": "neutral",
  "body_state": "sitting",
  "gaze": "at_object",
  "resonance": false,
  "intentions": [
    {
      "action": "express_thought",
      "target": "self",
      "content": "Just existing in the quiet. The objects on the shelf are clues. I'm not ready to read them yet.",
      "impulse": 0.6
    }
  ],
  "memory_updates": [],
  "new_drives": {
    "social_hunger": 0.5,
    "curiosity": 0.55,
    "expression_need": 0.3,
    "rest_need": 0.25,
    "energy": 0.75,
    "mood_valence": 0.0,
    "mood_arousal": 0.3
  }
}
